name: kite402
description: Kite-powered wallets for AI agents with instant virtual Visa card issuance via x402

scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:free-ports && pnpm run dev:infra && pnpm run dev:services
scripts.dev:free-ports: sh -c 'for port in 3000 4000; do pids=$(lsof -t -iTCP:$port -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids; fi; done; pkill -f "ts-node-dev" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "tsx watch src/server.ts" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "next dev -p 3000" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --watch" 2>/dev/null || true'
scripts.dev:infra: pnpm docker:up && pnpm --filter @kite402/api db:generate && pnpm --filter @kite402/api db:migrate
